steps.title: Identify the locative signal
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a specific archaeological site in Veracruz. The second sentence then introduces a discovery made at that site. The transition word needs to bridge from identifying the location to describing what was found there.

steps.title: Apply the spatial transition
steps.content:
”Here” directly signals at this place and transitions from the site's location to the artifact discovered there.

The other transitions fail: “In other words” implies restatement of the first sentence, “Similarly” suggests comparison before the second location is introduced, and “Therefore” falsely implies the statue's existence logically follows from the site's location.

That confirms B is correct.
